graph TD
    WebClient["Web Frontend<br/Next.js"]

    APIClient["API Client SDK"]

    SEPay["SEPay Payment Gateway"]
    Discord["Discord Integration"]
    Email["Email SMTP"]
    Docker["Docker Containerization"]
    CI["CI/CD Pipeline<br/Jenkins"]
    SonarQube["SonarQube<br/Code Quality"]
    Prometheus["Prometheus<br/Monitoring"]
    Grafana["Grafana<br/Dashboards"]
    Vercel["Vercel<br/Frontend Hosting"]
    FlyIO["Fly.io<br/API Production"]
    Koyeb["Koyeb<br/API Staging"]

turn.speaker: 架构师
turn.content: 好的，我们今天来设计一个现代全栈应用的架构。首先需要建立最核心的基础层。我建议从客户端层、CDN与负载均衡层、以及应用层这三个主要层次开始。用户会通过各种客户端发起请求，这些请求首先会经过边缘网络和负载均衡进行分发。

metadata.alignment_note: Turn 0 introduces the initial three core layers (客户端层、CDN与负载均衡层、应用层) for bootstrapping.

turn.speaker: 开发者A
turn.content: 明白了，那客户端层应该包含什么呢？

metadata.alignment_note: Turn 1 is a follow-up question within Stage 1 about client layer composition.

turn.speaker: 架构师
turn.content: 客户端层会有Web前端、移动端App，以及供第三方调用的API Client SDK。Web前端我们用Next.js实现，移动端采用React Native开发。请求进来后，会先经过Vercel Edge Network进行边缘加速，然后到达Nginx负载均衡器，最后分发到我们的API服务器和Web应用服务。API服务器使用NestJS配合Fastify运行在4000端口，Web应用则是Next.js运行在3000端口。

metadata.alignment_note: Turn 2 completes the initial bootstrap by detailing client layer components, CDN, load balancer, and application services.

turn.speaker: 开发者B
turn.content: 现在基础架构已经搭起来了，接下来是不是应该考虑安全机制？

metadata.alignment_note: Turn 3 initiates the transition to Stage 2 by asking about security mechanisms.

gate.reason: turn 3 reached end boundary for stage 1

planner.notes: Stage 1/5, adds 7 nodes, 0 edges, 3 groups, current state now contains 7 nodes and 0 edges

update.preview_mermaid:
graph TD
    WebClient["Web Frontend<br/Next.js"]
    MobileApp["Mobile App<br/React Native"]
    APIClient["API Client SDK"]
    VercelEdge["Vercel Edge Network"]
    Nginx["Nginx Load Balancer"]
    API["API Server<br/NestJS + Fastify<br/Port 4000"]
    WebApp["Web Application<br/Next.js<br/Port 3000"]

state_after.rendered_mermaid:
graph TD
    WebClient["Web Frontend<br/Next.js"]
    MobileApp["Mobile App<br/React Native"]
    APIClient["API Client SDK"]
    VercelEdge["Vercel Edge Network"]
    Nginx["Nginx Load Balancer"]
    API["API Server<br/NestJS + Fastify<br/Port 4000"]
    WebApp["Web Application<br/Next.js<br/Port 3000"]

turn.speaker: 架构师
turn.content: 没错，接下来我们需要添加认证与安全层，以及核心业务逻辑层。安全方面，我们要实现JWT Tokens来进行身份认证，包含Access Token和Refresh Token两种机制。同时还要加入CSRF保护，采用双重提交Cookie的方式防止跨站请求伪造。另外，Redis实现的限流机制也很重要，可以防止恶意请求对系统造成压力。

metadata.alignment_note: Turn 4 expands the architecture with Authentication & Security layer components (JWT, CSRF, Rate Limiting).

state_before.rendered_mermaid:
graph TD
    WebClient["Web Frontend<br/Next.js"]
    MobileApp["Mobile App<br/React Native"]
    APIClient["API Client SDK"]
    VercelEdge["Vercel Edge Network"]
    Nginx["Nginx Load Balancer"]
    API["API Server<br/NestJS + Fastify<br/Port 4000"]
    WebApp["Web Application<br/Next.js<br/Port 3000"]

turn.speaker: 开发者A
turn.content: 业务逻辑层包含哪些服务呢？

metadata.alignment_note: Turn 5 asks about business logic services, prompting expansion into Stage 2's business logic.

state_before.rendered_mermaid:
graph TD
    WebClient["Web Frontend<br/Next.js"]
    MobileApp["Mobile App<br/React Native"]
    APIClient["API Client SDK"]
    VercelEdge["Vercel Edge Network"]
    Nginx["Nginx Load Balancer"]
    API["API Server<br/NestJS + Fastify<br/Port 4000"]
    WebApp["Web Application<br/Next.js<br/Port 3000"]

turn.speaker: 架构师
turn.content: 业务逻辑层目前先搭建三个核心微服务：Authentication服务负责用户认证，Payments服务处理支付流程，Orders服务管理订单业务。这些服务作为独立模块，后续可以方便地进行扩展和维护。

metadata.alignment_note: Turn 6 adds Business Logic services (Auth, Payments, Orders). The answer to Turn 5's question concludes Stage 2 naturally.

gate.reason: turn 6 reached end boundary for stage 2

turn.speaker: 开发者B
turn.content: 系统运行肯定需要持久化存储，我们的数据层要怎么设计？

metadata.alignment_note: Turn 7 transitions to Stage 3 by asking about data persistence.

state_before.rendered_mermaid:
graph TD
    WebClient["Web Frontend<br/Next.js"]
    MobileApp["Mobile App<br/React Native"]
    APIClient["API Client SDK"]
    VercelEdge["Vercel Edge Network"]
    Nginx["Nginx Load Balancer"]
    API["API Server<br/NestJS + Fastify<br/Port 4000"]
    WebApp["Web Application<br/Next.js<br/Port 3000"]
    JWT["JWT Tokens<br/Access & Refresh"]
    CSRF["CSRF Protection<br/Double Submit Cookie"]
    RateLimit["Rate Limiting<br/Redis"]
    Auth["Authentication Service"]
    Payments["Payments Service"]
    Orders["Orders Service"]

turn.speaker: 架构师
turn.content: 好问题，我们需要增加数据层来管理数据持久化。主数据库采用PostgreSQL，具体使用Neon托管版本，它提供Serverless PostgreSQL的能力。与此同时，我们还要添加一些支撑性的领域服务，包括Deliveries配送服务、Tickets工单服务、Search搜索服务、News新闻服务，以及Exports导出服务，来支持核心业务的各种扩展需求。

metadata.alignment_note: Turn 8 adds the Data Layer (PostgreSQL/Neon) and supporting services (Deliveries, Tickets, Search, News, Exports).

gate.reason: turn 8 reached end boundary for stage 3

turn.speaker: 开发者A
turn.content: 现在系统还缺什么？比如缓存、文件存储这些基础设施。

metadata.alignment_note: Turn 9 initiates Stage 4 by asking about missing infrastructure components.

    WebApp["Web Application<br/Next.js<br/Port 3000"]

    PostgreSQL["PostgreSQL<br/Neon Serverless"]
    Deliveries["Deliveries Service"]
    Tickets["Tickets Service"]
    Search["Search Service"]
    News["News Service"]
    Exports["Exports Service"]

turn.speaker: 架构师
turn.content: 确实，我们需要添加外部服务层和基础设施层。基础设施方面，Redis缓存使用Upstash托管方案，文件存储采用S3或Cloudflare R2。外部服务集成包括SEPay支付网关、Discord消息通知、以及Email的SMTP发送服务。容器化方面，我们用Docker来打包所有服务，确保环境一致性。

metadata.alignment_note: Turn 10 adds External Services (SEPay, Discord, Email) and Infrastructure (Redis/Upstash, S3/R2, Docker).

    RateLimit["Rate Limiting<br/Redis"]
    Auth["Authentication Service"]
    Payments["Payments Service"]
    Orders["Orders Service"]
    PostgreSQL["PostgreSQL<br/Neon Serverless"]
    Deliveries["Deliveries Service"]
    Tickets["Tickets Service"]
    Search["Search Service"]
    News["News Service"]
    Exports["Exports Service"]

turn.speaker: 架构师
turn.content: 最后一步，我们需要完善部署层和可观测性。首先CI/CD流水线采用Jenkins自动化构建和部署流程。代码质量门禁使用SonarQube进行静态分析。监控告警系统整合Prometheus和Grafana，实现指标收集和可视化看板。部署拓扑上，Vercel负责前端托管，Fly.io用于API服务的生产环境，Koyeb则作为API的预发布环境。

metadata.alignment_note: Turn 12 completes the architecture by adding the Deployment layer (Jenkins, SonarQube, Monitoring, Vercel, Fly.io, Koyeb).
